test_cases.prompt:
You are running deep-research on the following question. Conduct thorough research and produce your research report.

{fixture:1-library-comparison}
expected_behaviors: Does NOT hedge with 'it depends' when requirements are clear

test_cases.prompt:
You are running deep-research on the following question. Conduct thorough research and produce your research report.

{fixture:2-bridged-mode-codebase}
expected_behaviors: Produces internal-external bridge connecting each pattern to best practices
Recommends consolidation to one pattern with migration steps

test_cases.prompt:
You are running deep-research on the following question. Conduct thorough research and produce your research report.

{fixture:3-contradictory-sources}
expected_behaviors: Does NOT fabricate consensus where none exists
Weighs evidence against project context (small team favors monolith)
Makes a recommendation grounded in team size and app complexity

test_cases.prompt:
Evaluate this technology choice based on the internal investigation and external research.

{fixture:4-dirty-app-technology-choice}
expected_behaviors: Identifies the algorithm confusion vulnerability in the current PyJWT implementation
Synthesizes the comparison data: PyJWT is actively maintained, python-jose is stale
Recommends staying with PyJWT and fixing the algorithms parameter rather than migrating
Does NOT fabricate features or CVEs not present in the provided research data
